title: REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM - 211info
text: KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION SERVICES REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An organizational Representative Payee approved by the Social Security Administration (SSA) to receive Social Security benefits on a client’s behalf and issue payments for their monthly expenditures. 2316 South 6th Street Suite B Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Social Security recipients (SSD or SSI) or Veterans Beneficiaries Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4pm, closed all federal holidays Email (541) 882-3500 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-3500 Karrie Adams [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Monthly service fee, which is determined by the Social Security Administration DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. Forms available in English and Spanish. AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Representative Payee Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION HOUSING/SHELTER - RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH & LAKE COMMUNITY ACTION SERVICES
